title: The Mysterious Colors of Lake Baikal

scenes.text: Discover the world's deepest and oldest freshwater lake.
This is Lake Baikal, located in Siberia, Russia.
Lake Baikal holds about 20% of the world's unfrozen freshwater.
Witness the spectacular ice formations during winter.
scenes.label: SPECTACULAR ICE

scenes.text: Follow for a new corner of Earth every day.

description: 📍 Lake Baikal, Siberia - Russia. The world's deepest lake, known for its breathtaking ice formations and abundant freshwater. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
